name: Pallth-7
description: Fracture networks catch the light — each line a fault from an ancient bombardment still exhaling the planet's history.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Lazurix-4
description: A world of impossible chun crystallization and metallic luster. The false dusk is cast by cobalt-iron skies.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Ceruleix-2
description: Rare chun crystallization pools in tectonic basins. The surface shifts with geological history written in impossible blues and seafoam bands.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Cromix-0
description: Silent, stratified war. Metallic veins flash copper and rust across its shoulders, while cobalt-iron pools in the valleys.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Pyr-os-8
description: Deep iron-manganese memories and copper-tin veins. The light pools in glossy, metallic craters.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Krel-ex-3
description: Cobalt-blue canyons run warm with ancient biological amber — a geological record written in slow-motion.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Nex-un-3
description: Deep blue web of mineral pools and metallic veins. The rare chun crystallization is the frozen echo of the world's first breath.
materials: Stoneware, carbon trap shino, chun blue
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Ignix-5
description: A layered map of mineral stratification and ancient fracture networks, glowing with deep manganese-iron hues.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Mariix-0
description: Intermittent plasma discharge scars the metallic veins, leaving transient maps we cannot decipher. Cobalt-iron pools in the basins flash under shifting light.
care: Hand wash only to preserve metallic luster.

name: Cupr-ex-6
description: Metallic veins pulse with copper and bronze luster across stratified canyons. Carbon trapping creates dark speckles across a textured, living surface.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.

name: Glacix-1
description: Compression slate meets a crystallized fluke of cobalt blue in the lowlands. Dappled micro-crystalline variegation etched into ridges of deep time.
care: Dishwasher safe. Hand wash recommended to preserve glaze.
